scope: one request-time read of the pinned 22,173-byte Hono context source through a 32 KiB-bounded file API and one Hono text response; HTTP/1.1; keep-alive; localhost
limitations: This measures repeated warm page-cache reads and one 22,173-byte response; it does not control the OS cache, isolate copies, or cover cold storage, responses above 32 KiB, streaming, binary data, ranges, or compression.
TinyTSX bounds each connection at 100 requests and reconnects; the Bun host may retain a connection longer.

environment.machine: Model Name: MacBook Pro; Model Identifier: Mac17,6; Chip: Apple M5 Max; Total Number of Cores: 18 (6 Super and 12 Performance); Memory: 128 GB
